name: Tradeify
description: Comprehensive prop-firm forensic dossier based on legacy research archives.
fullReview:
# Tradeify — EXTENSIVE PROP FIRM DEEP-DIVE REPORT

**Report Date:** April 2, 2026
**Target:** Tradeify (tradeify.co)
**Report Type:** Deep-Dive — Prop Firm Analysis
**Data Sources:** tradeify.co (official), Trustpilot, Prop Firm Match, PRNewswire, Prop Firm Hero, Prop Trading Vibes, PropDealsHub, FinSeeds, JoinProp

---

## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

Tradeify was founded by **Brett Simberkoff** (also known as "Brett Simba"), a professional day trader with over 6 years of experience in futures trading and prop firm evaluation systems. Brett previously founded **Simba Stocks**, a trading education and community platform, before launching Tradeify as a dedicated proprietary trading evaluation firm.

The company is headquartered in **Florida, USA** (specifically Boca Raton/Miami area based on PR Newswire press releases that list MIAMI as the dateline). Tradeify officially launched its platform around **2022-2024** (sources vary — early concepts in 2022, full platform launch around 2024-2025).

Unlike many prop firms built by financial institutions, Tradeify was built by a trader for traders. Brett's own experience with prop firm evaluation systems — their arbitrary rules, unfair drawdown structures, and activation fees — directly informed Tradeify's trader-first design philosophy.

### Key Milestones

| Year | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2022-2024 | Company founded by Brett Simberkoff in Florida |
| 2024 | Platform officially launches with "Straight to Sim Funded" model |
| 2024 | Partners with Luke "The Nuke" Littler, 2026 PDC World Darts Champion — The Champion Mindset, Chapter I |
| 2025 | Launches Growth evaluation plan (1-step evaluation) |
| 2025 | Launches SELECT evaluation plan — pass evaluation, then CHOOSE your funded structure |
| 2025 | Wins 3 Prop Firm Match Awards: Highest Rated, Best Payout Process, Most User Friendly (all Futures category) |
| 2025 | Crosses $110 million+ in verified payouts to traders |
| 2026 (Jan) | Partners with UFC legend **Israel Adesanya** (2x Middleweight Champion) — The Champion Mindset, Chapter II |
| 2026 (Jan) | FlyQuest Esports announces org-wide partnership with Tradeify |
| 2026 | Crosses $150 million+ in verified payouts |

### Employee Count & Ownership

- **Employees:** Not publicly disclosed (small to medium team based on operational scale)
- **Ownership:** Privately held; founded and led by Brett Simberkoff as Founder & CEO
- **Legal Entity:** US-based company registered in Florida
- **Previous Venture:** Brett previously founded and ran Simba Stocks (trading education/community)
- **No external VC funding disclosed** — appears to be self-funded/bootstrapped

### Headquarters & Office Locations

- **Primary HQ:** Florida, USA (Boca Raton/Miami area)
- **PR Newswire dateline:** Miami, FL
- **Contact:** hey@tradeify.co
- **Website:** tradeify.co
- **Help Center:** help.tradeify.co

### Customer Base

- **80,000+ traders** (per official website)
- **$150 million+** in verified payouts (cumulative, per official site)
- **75% buy-again rate** (per official website — traders who purchase a second account after their first)
- Serves traders globally (with restrictions — see Section 2)

---

## 2. REGULATION & LICENSING

### Regulatory Status

**Tradeify is NOT regulated as a financial services firm, broker, or investment company.** This is standard for the prop firm industry — Tradeify operates as a **trader evaluation and education platform** that provides simulated trading environments.

Key regulatory points:
- All funded accounts are **simulated trading environments** — no real capital is deployed on the trader's end
- Tradeify does not accept deposits or hold trader funds as an investment vehicle
- Traders trade in simulated market conditions with real-time market data
- The 3-step progression (Evaluation → Sim Funded → Live Funded) allows consistent traders to eventually trade with live capital at the Elite level

### Legal Entity Structure

- **Legal Name:** Tradeify (exact LLC/corp name not publicly disclosed)
- **Jurisdiction:** United States / Florida
- **Business Type:** Proprietary trading / trader evaluation platform
- Tradeify does not claim to be regulated by any financial authority (SEC, CFTC, NFA, etc.)
- Operates under the evaluation/education model common to the prop firm industry

### Restricted Countries

Tradeify maintains an extensive restricted countries list, prohibiting participation from residents of:

Afghanistan, Albania, Algeria, Andorra, Angola, Bahamas, Barbados, Belarus, Bosnia & Herzegovina, Botswana, Bulgaria, Burma (Myanmar), Burundi, Cambodia, Central African Republic, Côte d'Ivoire, Crimea, Cuba, Democratic Republic of Congo, Ecuador, Ethiopia, Ghana, Iceland, Indonesia, Iran, Iraq, Israel, Jamaica, Kosovo, Laos, Lebanon, Liberia, Libya, Malaysia, Mauritius, Mongolia, Montenegro, Morocco, Nicaragua, North Korea, Pakistan, Panama, Papua New Guinea, Russia, Somalia, South Sudan, Sri Lanka, Sudan, Syria, Trinidad and Tobago, Tunisia, Turkey, Uganda, Ukraine, Vietnam, Venezuela, Yemen, Zimbabwe

This list notably includes countries with active sanctions (Russia, Iran, Syria, North Korea) as well as countries with strict financial regulations.

### Regulatory Risk Assessment

The lack of regulation is **standard for prop firms** and not a red flag specific to Tradeify. However, traders should understand:
- No regulatory body oversees dispute resolution
- Tradeify sets its own rules and can modify them
- Legal recourse is limited to US/Florida courts
- Simulated trading model means traders are not actually trading on live markets until Elite Live funded stage

---

## 3. CHALLENGE RULES & PHASES ⭐ MOST IMPORTANT

Tradeify offers **three distinct funding paths**, each with different challenge rules and funded-stage structures:

### PATH 1: GROWTH EVALUATION — Fast Track

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Profit Target** | $3,000 (50K) / $6,000 (100K) / $9,000 (150K) |
| **Max Daily Loss** | $1,250 (50K) — SOFT BREACH (trading paused for day, not failed) |
| **Max Trailing Drawdown (EOD)** | $2,500 (50K) — End-of-Day trailing, updates at 5 PM ET |
| **Minimum Trading Days** | 1 day |
| **Consistency Rule** | None during evaluation; 35% on funded stage |
| **Time Limit** | None |
| **Monthly Subscription** | $139 (50K) / $239 (100K) / $339 (150K) |
| **Activation Fee** | None |

**Key Feature:** Minimum 1-day pass possible. The soft daily loss limit means hitting the daily limit pauses trading but doesn't fail your account — only the EOD trailing drawdown causes a hard fail.

### PATH 2: SELECT EVALUATION — Pass Once, Choose Your Funded Structure

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Profit Target** | $3,000 (50K) / $6,000 (100K) / $9,000 (150K) |
| **Max Daily Loss** | None (no daily loss limit at all) |
| **Max Trailing Drawdown (EOD)** | $2,500 (50K) — End-of-Day trailing |
| **Minimum Trading Days** | 3 days (due to 40% consistency rule) |
| **Consistency Rule** | 40% during evaluation (no single day > 40% of total profits) |
| **Time Limit** | None |
| **Monthly Subscription** | $159 (50K) / $259 (100K) / $359 (150K) |
| **Activation Fee** | None |

**After passing, you CHOOSE one of two funded structures:**

**SELECT Flex (5-Day Policy):**
- Payout after every 5 winning days
- Minimum profit per day: $150 (50K) / $200 (100K) / $250 (150K)
- Payout cap: 50% of total profits, max $3,000 per request (50K)
- No consistency rule once funded
- No daily loss limit
- No minimum balance requirement for future payouts
- Only need net positive since last payout to withdraw again

**SELECT Daily:**
- Request payouts every trading day after building buffer
- Buffer requirement: $2,100 (50K account)
- 2x multiplier rule: Can withdraw up to 2× profit since last payout
- Cap: $1,000 per withdrawal (50K)
- Must be net positive since last payout to request

### PATH 3: LIGHTNING FUNDED — Skip the Evaluation Entirely

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| **Profit Target** | None — immediately trading in Sim Funded |
| **Max Daily Loss** | Varies by account size |
| **Max Trailing Drawdown (EOD)** | Varies by account size |
| **Consistency Rule** | Tiered: 20% (1st payout), 25% (2nd), 30% (3rd+) |
| **Minimum Trading Days** | N/A |
| **Payment Type** | One-time fee (not subscription) |
| **Cost** | Starts at ~$349 (25K) / ~$799 (50K) |

**Key Feature:** No evaluation required. Start earning payouts from day one. The tiered consistency rule is designed to prevent traders from making one massive profitable day and cashing out repeatedly.

### Trading Rules — Universal Across All Plans

**Position Holding:**
- Must close ALL positions by 4:59 PM ET, Monday to Friday, before market close
- No overnight holding allowed
- No holding during market holidays
- When market closes at 5 PM ET, must be flat; resuming at 6 PM ET

**News Trading:**
- **No restrictions** — Tradeify allows trading during news events
- Traders warned about volatility risk but not penalized

**EOD Trailing Drawdown (Key Mechanism):**
- Drawdown floor only updates at 5 PM ET (end of day)
- Intraday losses do NOT tighten the drawdown floor
- If you're down $600 by noon but recover by close, it doesn't affect your floor
- The floor LOCKS permanently once EOD balance exceeds the floor by $100
- Example: On a 50K account with $2,500 DD, once balance clears $52,100, the floor stops trailing and locks at $50,100

**Contract Limits:**
- 4 contracts per $50K in account funding
- Example: 50K account = 4 contracts max; 150K account = 12 contracts max
- Known bug: SELECT accounts on Tradovate have micro position limits capped at 4 instead of advertised 40 (workaround: use mini contracts)

**Position Limits by Plan:**
- Up to 5 Sim Funded Accounts simultaneously allowed

---

## 4. ACCOUNT TYPES & PRICING

### Growth Evaluation — Monthly Subscription

| Account Size | Monthly Fee | Profit Target | Daily Loss Limit | EOD Drawdown |
|-------------|-------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| $25,000 | ~$99 | $1,500 | $625 | $1,250 |
| $50,000 | $139 | $3,000 | $1,250 | $2,500 |
| $100,000 | $239 | $6,000 | $2,500 | $5,000 |
| $150,000 | $339 | $9,000 | $3,750 | $7,500 |

### SELECT Evaluation — Monthly Subscription

| Account Size | Monthly Fee | Profit Target | Daily Loss Limit | EOD Drawdown |
|-------------|-------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| $25,000 | ~$129 | $1,500 | None | $1,250 |
| $50,000 | $159 | $3,000 | None | $2,500 |
| $100,000 | $259 | $6,000 | None | $5,000 |
| $150,000 | $359 | $9,000 | None | $7,500 |

### Lightning Funded — One-Time Payment

| Account Size | One-Time Fee | Consistency Rule |
|-------------|-------------|-----------------|
| $25,000 | ~$349 | 20%/25%/30% tiered |
| $50,000 | ~$799 | 20%/25%/30% tiered |
| $100,000 | ~$1,399+ | 20%/25%/30% tiered |

### No Activation Fees

A key differentiator: Tradeify charges **NO activation fees** on Growth and SELECT plans. Many competitors (Topstep, Apex) charge a one-time activation fee when you pass the evaluation, which can be $100-$150+. Tradeify eliminates this entirely.

### Reset Policy

- Failed evaluation accounts can be reset by purchasing a reset credit
- Reset credits applied through the dashboard
- **Sim Funded / Lightning Funded accounts have NO reset option** — if you fail, you need to purchase a new account

---

## 5. TRADING CONDITIONS

### Trading Platforms

Tradeify supports **three trading platforms:**

1. **Tradovate** — Primary platform. Full functionality for all account types. Required for SELECT plan.
2. **NinjaTrader** — Supported for Growth and Lightning Funded accounts via Tradovate connection. Requires signing Non-Professional Data Agreement first.
3. **TradingView** — Supported for Growth and Lightning Funded accounts via Tradovate integration. Free add-on activated through Tradovate account settings.

**Not Yet Supported (but in development):**
- Quantower (planned)
- Rithmic (planned)
- DXtrade / ProjectX (retired in late 2025)

**Platform Limitation:** SELECT plan is Tradovate-only. Traders with customized NinjaTrader setups cannot use SELECT.

### Tradable Instruments

Tradeify is a **futures-only** prop firm. All trading is on regulated futures exchanges:

- **Equity Index Futures:** E-mini S&P 500 (ES), Micro E-mini S&P 500 (MES), E-mini Nasdaq-100 (NQ), Micro E-mini Nasdaq-100 (MNQ), E-mini Dow (YM), Micro E-mini Dow (MYM), E-mini Russell 2000 (RTY), Micro E-mini Russell 2000 (M2K)
- **Commodity Futures:** Gold (GC), Micro Gold (MGC), Silver (SI), Micro Silver (SIL), Crude Oil (CL), Micro WTI Oil (MCL), Natural Gas (NG)
- **Currency Futures:** Euro FX (6E), British Pound (6B), Australian Dollar (6A), Japanese Yen (6J), Canadian Dollar (6C)
- **Treasury Futures:** 10-Year T-Note (ZN), Ultra T-Bond (UB), 5-Year T-Note (ZF)
- **Volatility Futures:** VIX (VX)

### Leverage & Margins

- Futures inherently use leverage through exchange-set margins
- Margin requirements are set by CME/COMEX/NYMEX/CBOT exchanges
- Tradeify does not impose additional leverage restrictions beyond standard futures margins
- Day trading margins may differ from overnight margins (positions must be closed EOD anyway)

### Commission Fees

- Commission rates are set by Tradovate (the broker/platform partner)
- Standard rates: approximately $0.85-$2.25 per contract side depending on instrument and Tradovate plan
- Micro contracts have lower per-contract fees but require more contracts for the same exposure
  - Example: 10 MES contracts cost $18.20 in fees vs 1 ES contract at $5.76

### Execution Model

- **Simulated trading environment** for Evaluation and Sim Funded stages
- Real-time market data feeds from CME Group exchanges
- Execution designed to mirror live market conditions
- Live funded accounts at the Elite level involve actual capital deployment

### Market Data

- **Free real-time CME Group data** included with all plans
- Traders must sign the Non-Professional Data Agreement via Tradovate
- Market data activates within 15 minutes of login and agreement signing

---

## 6. PAYOUTS & PROFIT SPLIT

### Profit Split Structure

| Phase | Profit Split |
|-------|-------------|
| First $15,000 Earned | **100%** — trader keeps all of first $15K |
| After $15,000 | **90%** to trader / 10% to Tradeify |

This is one of the most generous splits in the industry. Many competitors offer 80-90% from day one, but Tradeify's 100% on the first $15K is a significant differentiator for new funded traders.

### Payout Frequency by Plan

| Plan | Payout Frequency |
|------|-----------------|
| Growth (Sim Funded) | 5-Day (after minimum qualifying days) |
| SELECT Flex | 5-Day (after 5 winning qualifying days) |
| SELECT Daily | Every trading day (after building buffer) |
| Lightning Funded | 5-Day (after meeting daily profit thresholds) |

### Payout Speed

Tradeify processes payouts via **Rise and Plane** payment platforms:
- **Target:** 60 minutes to 5 days depending on plan
- **Reported average:** Same-day in many cases, often within 1-2 hours
- Weekend payouts have been reported — requests submitted on Friday may process Sunday morning
- Some traders report 4-day waits during peak periods (rare, Tradeify follows up)

### Payout Thresholds

| Plan | Minimum per Day | Payout Cap per Request |
|------|----------------|----------------------|
| Growth (50K) | Varies | Varies by account size |
| SELECT Flex (50K) | $150/day for 5 days | $3,000 max (50% of total profits) |
| SELECT Daily (50K) | N/A (need $2,100 buffer) | $1,000 max (capped at 2× profit since last payout) |

### Payment Methods

- **Rise** — Handles most trader payouts
- **Plane** — Alternative payment processor
- Crypto payments available through these platforms
- Bank transfer options through payment processors

### Reset Fees for Funded Accounts

- **NO reset fees for funded accounts** — if you maintain your account within drawdown limits, you don't pay additional fees
- This contrasts with competitors like Apex/Topstep that charge reset fees when funded accounts are lost

---

## 7. SCALING PLAN ⭐ IMPORTANT

### How Scaling Works

Tradeify's scaling operates differently from traditional prop firms. Rather than a tiered percentage-based account growth plan, Tradeify uses a **3-step progression model**:

### Step 1: Evaluation → Sim Funded

- Pass your chosen evaluation plan (Growth, SELECT, or Lightning Funded)
- Gain access to Simulated Funded account with full payout capabilities
- Maximum of 5 Sim Funded Accounts at any time

### Step 2: Sim Funded → Tradeify Elite (Live Funded)

- After earning **5 qualifying payouts** across your Tradeify accounts, you become eligible for Live funding consideration
- Tradeify's risk management team monitors performance throughout
- No hard published threshold — Tradeify reaches out when they select you
- Transition is performance-based, not automatic

### Step 3: Live Funded Benefits

As a Live trader on Tradeify Elite:

| Feature | Detail |
|---------|--------|
| **LIVE Funded Accounts** | Up to 5 live funded accounts |
| **Uncapped Daily Payouts** | No payout ceiling — documented cases of $50,000 in a single payout |
| **Free Coaching & Risk Manager** | 1-on-1 coaching from professional trader educators |
| **Higher Leverage** | Elite-level program for experienced traders |

### Combined Funding Cap

- Up to **5 Sim Funded Accounts** simultaneously
- Maximum combined funding: **$750,000** (5 × $150K accounts)
- With Live funded accounts: potentially higher

### Growth Path Comparison

| Traditional Prop Firms | Tradeify |
|----------------------|----------|
| Gradual % increase per cycle | Step-based progression (5 payouts → Elite) |
| Account size increases gradually | Jump to Live status with full benefits |
| Monthly/quarterly review cycles | Continuous monitoring by risk managers |
| Maxes at $400K-$2M | $750K Sim + Live (uncapped at Elite) |

---

## 8. USER REVIEWS — AGGREGATED

### Trustpilot

- **Score: 4.6 / 5.0** (approximately 2,400+ reviews as of April 2026)
- **Ranking:** #92 of 339 best Software Companies; #144 of 245 Non-Bank Financial Services on Trustpilot

**What Users Love:**
- Lightning-fast payouts — most frequently praised feature
- Excellent customer service with fast response times
- Clear, transparent rules without hidden gotchas
- Free built-in trade journal with personalized insights
- No activation fees — saves $100-150 compared to competitors
- Modern, polished platform user experience
- Reliable and predictable rule enforcement

**Common Complaints:**
- KYC verification process can be slow for some traders
- Payout process not always fully automated — occasional delays (3-5 days during busy periods)
- SELECT micro contract bug (Tradovate platform limitation)
- Support quality can fluctuate — some reports of 3-5 day ticket wait times
- "Net positive between payouts" rule on SELECT Flex feels arbitrary
- Discord moderator interactions occasionally snarky
- Some accounts stuck during compliance reviews

### Prop Firm Match Community Reviews

Based on trader feedback on Prop Firm Match:
- SELECT Flex is the most highly recommended plan type
- Traders praise the EOD trailing drawdown as the best in class
- Funded rules on SELECT Flex are "genuinely clean" — no daily loss limit, no consistency rule
- Growth plan praised for 1-day pass potential
- Some traders note funded buffer requirements on Growth are higher than SELECT
- Lightning Funded consistency rule escalation is "annoying but manageable"

### Reddit & Community Sentiment

- Tradeify widely considered a **top-tier futures prop firm** alongside Topstep
- Frequently recommended for day traders who want fair drawdown rules
- Higher satisfaction with customer service compared to Apex/Topstep on community forums
- The EOD trailing drawdown specifically cited as a major advantage over intraday trailing competitors
- Some skepticism about the Live funding path due to ambiguous selection criteria

### Review Consensus

**Positive:** Fast payouts, clear rules, excellent support, no activation fees, EOD trailing drawdown is trader-friendly, generous profit split
**Negative:** SELECT limited to Tradovate only, micro contract position limit bug, KYC delays, ambiguous Live funding criteria, occasional support response time spikes

## 9. COMPETITIVE POSITION

### Tradeify vs Competitors (Futures Prop Firms)

| Feature | Tradeify SELECT | Tradeify Growth | Topstep | Apex Trader Funding | MyFundedFutures |
|---------|----------------|----------------|---------|-------------------|-----------------|
| Founded | 2022-2024 | 2022-2024 | 2012 | 2021 | 2022 |
| Max Account | $150K | $150K | $150K | $300K | $300K |
| Challenge Type | 1-Step | 1-Step | 2-Step | 1-Step | 1-Step |
| Min Days to Pass | 3 | 1 | 10+ | 1 | 1 |
| Profit Split | 100% → 90% | 100% → 90% | 100% → 90% | 100% → 90% | 70% → 90% |
| Activation Fee | $0 | $0 | $149 | $299-499 | $149 |
| Drawdown Type | EOD trailing | EOD trailing | Intraday trail | Intraday trail | EOD trailing |
| Daily Loss Limit | None | Soft breach | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Funded Consistency | None (Flex) / Varies | 35% | Varies | Yes | Yes |
| Trustpilot | 4.6 (2,400+) | 4.6 (2,400+) | 4.5+ (5,000+) | 4.3+ (4,000+) | 4.2+ |
| Payout Speed | 1-5 days | 1-5 days | 1-5 days | 2-7 days | 2-7 days |
| Platforms | Tradovate | Tradovate, NT, TV | TSTrader | Rithmic, Tradovate | Tradovate |
| Free Trial | Available | Available | Available | No | Yes |

### What Makes Tradeify Unique

1. **SELECT plan** — Pass once, then choose your funded structure. No other prop firm offers this flexibility
2. **100% profit split on first $15K** — Traders keep everything initially
3. **No activation fees** — Saves $100-500 compared to Topstep/Apex
4. **EOD trailing drawdown across all plans** — Only major prop firm with EOD on every option
5. **No daily loss limit on SELECT** — Unique in the industry
6. **Soft breach on Growth** — Daily loss limit pauses trading, doesn't fail account
7. **Built-in trade journal** — Free tool included with all accounts
8. **Lightning Funded** — Skip evaluation entirely
9. **Path to LIVE funding** — 5-payout pathway with live trading and coaching
10. **Sports sponsorships** — UFC Champion + Darts Champion ambassadors

### Market Position

Tradeify is positioned as a **premium, trader-friendly futures prop firm** that competes at the top tier alongside Topstep. While Topstep has the longer track record and larger brand name, Tradeify has rapidly gained market share by offering features that address the most common trader complaints about prop firms: activation fees, harsh drawdown rules, and slow payouts. Their 2025 sweep of Prop Firm Match awards validates this positioning.

---

## 10. AFFILIATE PROGRAM

### Program Overview

Tradeify runs a structured affiliate program with percentage-based commissions, cookie-based tracking, and monthly payouts processed through Plane.

### Commission Structure

| Action | Commission | Example |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Growth Evaluation purchase (any size) | **15%** | $139/mo × 15% = ~$21/month per referral |
| SELECT Evaluation purchase (any size) | **15%** | $169/mo × 15% = ~$25/month per referral |
| Lightning Funded purchase | **10%** | $799 × 10% = ~$80 one-time |
| Evaluation Reset | **$5 flat** | Per reset |
| Account Activation | **$5 flat** | Per activation |

### Key Program Details

- **Cookie Duration:** **60-day cookie window** — if user clicks your link and purchases within 60 days, you earn commission
- **Last Click Attribution:** If user applies another affiliate's discount code, that affiliate gets credit (Last Click wins)
- **Minimum Payout:** **$1,000** — commissions roll over until threshold is met
- **Payment Schedule:** 15th of each month for prior month's commissions
- **Payment Processor:** Plane (crypto + bank transfer options)
- **Recurring Income:** Growth/SELECT subscription-based = monthly recurring commissions
- **Payout Methods via Plane:** ACH, Wire, Crypto (Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, etc.)

### Custom Discount Codes

- Affiliates can request custom discount codes by submitting a ticket through the Help Center
- Must provide: brand exposure, reach, engagement metrics, and data from previous promotions
- Discount code subject to approval

### Affiliate Dashboard

- Track total clicks, sign-ups, active subscriptions, commissions earned, and pending vs paid commissions
- Dashboard accessible after affiliate application approval

### Application Process

- Apply via tradeify.co/become-an-affiliate
- Subject to approval
- Marketing guidelines must be followed

### Affiliate Program Assessment

The $1,000 minimum payout is **higher than competitors** (Topstep: $100, Apex: $50, MyFundedFutures: $100), which means it takes longer to receive your first payout. However, the 15% recurring commission on subscription-based plans is strong for building long-term income. The 60-day cookie window is competitive and provides a good safety net for delayed conversions.

## 12. PROP FIRM SPECIFIC — RULES TRANSPARENCY

### Rule Clarity

Tradeify is generally praised for having **clear, well-documented rules**. Key transparency indicators:

- Comprehensive Help Center at help.tradeify.co with detailed articles on all rules
- Dedicated article on trailing drawdowns explaining the mechanics
- Active Discord community with moderators answering questions
- Tradeify TV — weekday live stream (8:30 AM - 12:30 PM ET) with market insights and Q&A

### Known "Gotchas" & Gray Areas

1. **SELECT Micro Contract Bug:** SELECT accounts on Tradovate cap micro positions at 4 instead of advertised 40. Tradeify acknowledges it as a Tradovate-side issue. Workaround: use mini contracts (higher per-contract fees)
2. **"Net Positive Between Payouts" Rule (SELECT Flex):** Need to show at least $1 of profit since last withdrawal to request the next payout. This creates arbitrary friction during drawdown periods
3. **Ambiguous Elite Selection Criteria:** No published threshold for when Tradeify selects traders for Live funding — "5 payouts and we'll reach out" lacks transparency
4. **Tiered Consistency Escalation (Lightning Funded):** Consistency rule tightens from 20% → 25% → 30% as you progress, which penalizes success
5. **SELECT Limited to Tradovate:** NinjaTrader and TradingView connections don't work with SELECT — only Tradovate platform
6. **4:59 PM ET Position Closure:** Strict rule — holding any position past close (including by accident) is a rule violation
7. **KYC Verification Delays:** Some traders report being stuck in KYC for extended periods

### Rule Change History

Tradeify has evolved rules over time, generally in traders' favor:
- Launched with "Advanced" plan (intraday trailing) — later retired in favor of EOD trailing for all plans
- Introduced SELECT plan in late 2025 with innovative "choose your funded structure" model
- Retired ProjectX platform integration in late 2025, consolidated on Tradovate
- Lightning Funded (formerly "Straight to Sim Funded") received updated tiered consistency rules

### Account Success/Failure Rate

- Not publicly disclosed
- Industry average for 1-step evaluations: 70-80% failure rate
- Prop Firm Match verified data shows Tradeify traders passing evaluations and earning payouts regularly
- The EOD trailing drawdown likely results in a higher pass rate compared to intraday trailing competitors

---

## 13. PARTNERSHIPS & SPONSORSHIPS

### Major Sports Sponsorships

**UFC — Israel "Izzy" Adesanya Partnership (January 2026):**
- Long-term partnership with UFC legend and two-time middleweight champion Israel Adesanya
- Adesanya serves as **Global Brand Ambassador**
- Part of "The Champion Mindset, Chapter II: Adaptability" campaign
- Announced ahead of Adesanya's UFC Seattle return fight vs Joe Pyfer on March 28
- Coverage on PRNewswire, Morningstar, and major sports outlets
- CEO quote: "There are few athletes who embody The Champion Mindset campaign as well as he does"
- Includes exclusive giveaway campaigns tied to Adesanya's fights

## 14. CHARITY & CSR

### Trader Education Initiatives

Tradeify focuses its community investments on **education and accessibility** rather than traditional charity:

- **Tradeify TV** — Free daily live broadcasts with professional trader educators providing market insights and strategy breakdowns
- **Free Trade Journal** — Built-in analytics tool included with all accounts (journal, calendar, personalized insights)
- **Elite Coaching Program** — Free 1-on-1 coaching from professional trader educators for Live funded traders
- **Discount Codes** — Regular promotional campaigns that reduce evaluation costs for new traders

### Accessibility Mission

- **No activation fees** — Removes a financial barrier that competitors impose ($100-500+ on other platforms)
- **Free real-time data** — Included with all plans (competitors often charge $10-30/month)
- **Free Trial** — Allows prospective traders to test the platform before committing financially
- **Multiple funding paths** — Accommodates different skill levels, risk tolerances, and financial situations

### Note

Tradeify does not prominently feature traditional CSR programs (charity donations, environmental initiatives, etc.) in their public communications. Their social impact is primarily through democratizing access to trading capital and providing educational resources for aspiring traders worldwide.

## 16. PROMOTIONS & OFFERS

### Free Trial

- **Tradeify Free Trial** available for all prospective traders
- Allows testing of platform, rules, and conditions before financial commitment
- Accessible through the website or Help Center
- Includes access to trade journal and analytics tools

### Current Promotions

- **Regular Discount Codes** — Tradeify frequently offers discount codes through social media and affiliates
- **SELECT launch** — When SELECT launched, early-bird discounts were available
- **Seasonal promotions** — Black Friday, New Year, and event-tied campaigns (e.g., UFC fight promotions with Adesanya)

### No Activation Fee Policy

One of Tradeify's core promotional differentiators is its **permanent NO ACTIVATION FEE policy** on Growth and SELECT plans:
- Competitors like Topstep ($149), Apex ($299-499), and MyFundedFutures ($149) all charge activation fees
- This saves traders $100-500+ per compared to competitors
- Tradeify has committed to this as a permanent policy, not a temporary promotion

### Affiliate Discount Codes

- Custom discount codes available through approved affiliates
- Last-click attribution model applies
- Code discounts are applied to monthly subscription fees (Growth/SELECT)

### Loyalty/Benefits

- **75% buy-again rate** — suggests strong retention
- Built-in trade journal with personalized insights (free for all traders)
- Tradeify TV live content free for community
- Path to Live Elite funding with free coaching
- Tradeify e-shop (apparel/merch, Prime/Supreme member discounts at competitor FTMO set the benchmark)

## SUMMARY & RATING

### Overall Assessment

Tradeify has rapidly risen from a startup launch to one of the **top 3 futures prop firms globally**, and its 2025 Prop Firm Match award sweep validates this trajectory. The SELECT plan is genuinely innovative — no other prop firm lets you choose your funded structure after passing. Combined with EOD trailing drawdown across all plans, no activation fees, and 100% profit split on the first $15K, Tradeify offers some of the most trader-friendly terms in the industry.

The company's aggressive marketing (UFC Champions, esports partnerships, FlyQuest) and rapid payout infrastructure ($150M+ verified, 60-minute target processing) demonstrate both ambition and execution capability. At 80,000+ traders and growing, Tradeify is still in growth mode — an advantage for affiliates and an opportunity for new traders to enter before potential fee increases.

### Strengths
- ✅ **SELECT plan innovation** — Pass once, choose funded structure after
- ✅ **EOD trailing drawdown** on all plans — best-in-class for day traders
- ✅ **No activation fees** — saves $100-500 vs Topstep/Apex
- ✅ **100% profit split on first $15K** — most generous early-stage split
- ✅ **90/10 split thereafter** — top-tier ongoing profit share
- ✅ **60-minute target payout processing** — industry-leading speed target
- ✅ **$150M+ verified payouts** — proven track record
- ✅ **No daily loss limit on SELECT** — unique in the industry
- ✅ **Soft breach on Growth** — daily limit pauses, doesn't fail
- ✅ **Free trade journal + real-time data** included
- ✅ **3 Prop Firm Match 2025 awards** — Highest Rated, Best Payouts, Most User Friendly
- ✅ **Major sponsorships** — UFC Champion, Darts Champion, FlyQuest
- ✅ **80,000+ traders, 75% buy-again rate** — strong retention

### Weaknesses
- ❌ **Relatively new company** (founded ~2022-2024) — shorter track record than Topstep (2012)
- ❌ **SELECT limited to Tradovate only** — no NinjaTrader/TradingView for SELECT
- ❌ **Micro contract position limit bug** — SELECT accounts capped at 4 micros instead of 40
- ❌ **Futures-only** — no Forex, stocks, or crypto (limits appeal)
- ❌ **Ambiguous Live funded selection criteria** — no published threshold for Elite
- ❌ **Tiered consistency escalation** on Lightning Funded (tightens as you succeed)
- ❌ **$1,000 affiliate payout threshold** — higher than most competitors
- ❌ **No reset option for Sim Funded accounts** — must buy new account if failed
- ❌ **Restricted countries list is extensive** — excludes many potential markets
- ❌ **KYC verification delays** reported by some traders
- ❌ **Position closing at 4:59 PM ET strict** — no overnight or swing trading

### Prop Firm Rating (Preliminary)

| Category | Score | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Challenge Rules & Fairness | 8.5/10 | EOD trailing, no activation fee, no daily loss on SELECT |
| Payouts & Reliability | 9/10 | Fast processing, 100%→90% split, $150M+ verified |
| Trading Conditions | 8/10 | Good platforms (Tradovate-first), futures only |
| Scaling & Growth Path | 7.5/10 | 3-step model; Live criteria ambiguous but Elite benefits strong |
| User Reviews | 8.5/10 | 4.6/5 Trustpilot, 3 major awards in 2025 |
| Transparency | 7.5/10 | Clear rules overall; Elite selection and some gray areas |
| **OVERALL** | **8.2/10** | **Top-tier futures prop firm; SELECT plan is industry-leading** |
